creator: jkempf@davisvision.com
text:
When a WiSPY DBx Spectrum Analyzer is plugged into a FreeBSD system, uhid(4) attaches to the device, while ugen(4) is needed to actually use the thing.

Fix: Update usbdevs and usb_quirks.c for the DBx, and Metageek's new vendor ID. The attached patch works on 7.2.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Attach a WiSPY DBx to a FreeBSD machine.
